lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Arr? Be ye wantin' te go on account with our gang o' fillibusters?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: The powder monkey be takin' a caulk after gettin' rowdy on bumboo, so there be plenty of room for ye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Riiiiight...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll just be over here if you need me.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Wanna buy some clothes? Good quality, none of yer rags.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll take a look.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Then what are you doin' in my shop? Move along.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why does that shirt have a hole in it?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: It's to put your head through.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In the stomach? Isn't that an odd place for a neck hole?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Oh! It seems as if I must have slipped while cleaning it and put a bit of a hole in the front.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Silly me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What were you cleaning it with, a blood-covered scimitar?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: If I say yes will you buy it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Then no, I was not cleaning it with a blood-covered scimitar.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do you get these clothes?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Found em.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You found a bunch of slashed up clothing, some of which has been shoddily cleaned and stitched together?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Look, do you want in on this or not?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll take a look.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Then what are you doin' in my shop? Move along.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where did that pillar come from?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: You wanna buy it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is it for sale?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Would you buy it if it was?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If it was could you sell it to me?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: If I couldn't would you still give me the money?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where did this pillar come from?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Dunno. There are a load of islands out this way, and a lot of them have little bits and pieces like this scattered around.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: The way I see it, there must have been some people out here at one point, then they went away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Search me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd rather not.
